cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out which answer is correct based on the text. The question is asking what the text suggests. The options are A to D. First, let me read through the text again to make sure I understand the key points. The text is about Zhao Wenxuan, a Taiwan film star. It says he became interested in films as a child and worked in an airline before getting into acting. He got his break through the film "Wedding Feast" by answering an ad. The film was a hit, won awards like the German Golden Bear and was in Oscar competition. It was the first Taiwan film allowed in the U.S. Because of this film, he became popular in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Southeast Asia. Then he did other films like "Red Rose and White Rose" and has been active since. He also mentions cooperation between Taiwan and mainland in film. Now the options: A) "Wedding Feast" is an ordinary film. But the text says it was a hit, won awards, and was significant as the first Taiwan film in the U.S. So A is probably wrong. B) The film disappointed people. No, the opposite is said. So B is incorrect. C) Zhao became famous because of "Wedding Feast". The text says thanks to the film he became popular. So this seems correct. D) A lot of Taiwan films are shown in the U.S.
